svg.text: SESSION OPERATIONAL FLOW
ONE SESSION, START TO FINISH · WHAT YOU DO · WHAT RUNS ITSELF · READ LEFT TO RIGHT
DWG HARNESS-002
REV F · SHEET 2 OF 2
P1 — ENTRY + VALIDATION
[YOU] open or resume a Copilot session
that is the entire trigger
AUTO: sessionStart fires →
check_ticket_log.sh audits state left by the PAST
THE ENTRY SWEEP — EACH Tickets/ SUBDIR SORTS INTO ONE STATE
check_ticket_log.sh classifies by fact, never guesses:
① recognised name → validated (recency · state · index)
② .not-a-ticket marker → SILENT — deliberately skipped
③ .ticket-pending marker → NON-SILENCEABLE nag until renamed + marker removed
④ hand-made name, no marker → status WARNs, never blocks
only ① feeds the ENTRY RESULT gate below; ②–④ are notes, not blockers
ENTRY
RESULT?
GREEN
just work
WARN / NOTE
Yellow schedules.
Note it; handle at the next
boundary (curator at close-out).
DO NOT stop the flow.
FAIL — red blocks
Read the line — it names the fix.
It is about the PREVIOUS session, not this one.
Mechanical or substantive?
(index/section glitch) vs (missing record)
MECH → run the printed fix
delegable to the session agent · ~1 minute
SUBST → reconstruct honestly
git log / diff shows all writes → ticket-scribe,
late-but-true. Can't? Log "session
unrecorded + commit range".
Re-run check_ticket_log.sh → green.
NEVER fabricate a record to silence the gate.
P1 PASSED — continue at top of next column ▶
P2 — TICKET: PICK UP OR CONTINUE
NEW
TICKET?
NO
agent rehydrates from:
backbone + header + Current State ONLY
the context budget, working as intended
YES
[YOU] pick ticket-init from the dropdown
paste the Jira link — that's the whole message
agent: pulls Jira → shows digest → asks EXACTLY 3:
your words · non-negotiables · repo(s)
[YOU] answer · pick a suggested branch name
recorded only — the agent never creates branches
"In my words" Background · Non-negotiables checklist
adjacency scan → pointers · Current State seeded
ticket-scribe logs the init
P3 — THE WORK ITEM
· EXAMPLE: THREAD A NEW FIELD THROUGH A STAGING MODEL
[YOU] state the task in one message
"add the new field to the staging model + tests"
agent works the repo:
branch · edit model · fix unit tests · sqlfluff
normal git + PR rules apply — the harness
never touches GitHub/ by itself
mid-session events (all automatic):
compaction → AGENTS.md re-points the agent (loaded every surface)
you wander off → NOTHING fires; that's fine — next entry validates (S3)
task done → TASK END, next column ▶
HARNESS RECORDS, IN PARALLEL (AUTOMATIC):
every Tickets-file write → auto-commit
postToolUse · no-op-safe · you never see it
fires only in the keyed estate (harness.estate=true, set at install)
anywhere else — no key → exits silently, touches nothing
a check worth keeping → check-scribe →
notebook cell: why-note + code + result
long output → Logs/ — grep-slice it,
never dump it into chat context
TASK END — THE ATOMIC STEP (agent-invoked, you watch)
ticket-scribe: Session Log entry + Current State refresh, ONE step, never split
knowledge-keeper: 0–2 learnings → AI-Knowledge/ + _index — zero files is legal
[OPTIONAL] doc-writer drafts PR text from Current State
then [YOU] click Create PR — a communication act stays a human act
P4 — WALK AWAY: just leave. Close the laptop.
writes already committed · record already written · next entry gate audits
if sessionEnd fires: harmless bonus re-run — everything is idempotent
WHEN THINGS BREAK — SIDE QUESTS, NOT BLOCKERS
S4 — AGENT WROTE GARBAGE
git -C ~/Work log → revert the paths → re-run the agent, or fix by hand
same failure ×3 = upstream bug: stop mopping →
make_context_pack.sh → design session (harnessception)
S5 — MACHINERY ITSELF BROKEN
hook silent · agent missing from picker · script errors →
run harness-status.sh, follow its prescriptions
ticket delivery is never blocked — but end every affected session
with a MANUAL ticket-scribe run · fix before it becomes normal
RED BLOCKS · YELLOW SCHEDULES · NEVER FABRICATE · LATE-BUT-TRUE BEATS FICTION
